Note:
(This note is for the translator only and does not need to be translated.)
If you notice strange gaps appearing in each line of text, those are placeholders.
The game is already set up so that each dialogue box can display a maximum of four lines of text, 
and any text exceeding four lines will automatically continue in the next dialogue box. 
To avoid awkward line breaks in the actual display, I will manually trim long passages whenever necessary so that, 
as much as possible, a complete sentence appears within a single dialogue box.
The intentional insertion of spaces is meant to split the text into content for different dialogue boxes.
So when translating into other languages, you may follow this rule and add blank placeholders yourself to split the text.
